# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive-Logging-CI-CD
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0  # Clone the entire repository to get environment variables

      - name: Set up logging for debugging CI/CD issues
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14.x'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Log Environment Variables
        run: |
          echo "ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES:"
          printenv | grep -v PASSWORD > env_vars.log
          cat env_vars.log

      - name: Run Build Commands
        id: build_command
        run: npm run build  # Replace with your custom build command

      - name: Log Command Outputs
        run: |
          echo "BUILD COMMAND OUTPUTS:"
          cat build.log  # Replace with your custom log file

      - name: Deploy to Production
        uses: actions/exec@v1
        with:
          command: 'deploy'  # Replace with your custom deploy command
          capture-output: true
        env:
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}  # Replace with your custom API key secret
          CONNECTION_STRING: ${{ secrets.CONNECTION_STRING }}  # Replace with your custom connection string secret

      - name: Log Deployment Details and API Responses
        run: |
          echo "DEPLOYMENT DETAILS AND API RESPONSES:"
          cat deployment_details.log
